subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! On this Day must the people of God hold fast, with unity and concord, that all horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی امروز باید حزب الله باتحاد و اتفاق تمسک نمایند تا جمیع آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @call to action
